# Build-constrained source declarations cannot be moved into an unconstrained sink.
# Expect: non-zero exit, stderr identifies build constraint mismatch, files unchanged.
cp a.go a_before.go
cp b.go b_before.go
! exec sflit -source a.go -sink b.go -regex '^Foo' -move
stderr 'cannot move build-constrained declarations into sink with different build constraints'
cmp a.go a_before.go
cmp b.go b_before.go

# Unconstrained source declarations cannot be copied into a constrained sink.
# Expect: non-zero exit, stderr identifies build constraint mismatch, files unchanged.
cp unconstrained.go unconstrained_before.go
cp constrained_sink.go constrained_sink_before.go
! exec sflit -source unconstrained.go -sink constrained_sink.go -regex '^Baz'
stderr 'cannot move declarations into sink with different build constraints'
cmp unconstrained.go unconstrained_before.go
cmp constrained_sink.go constrained_sink_before.go

# Matching build constraints are allowed.
exec sflit -source linux.go -sink linux_extra.go -regex '^Foo'
cmp linux_extra.go expected_linux_extra.go

-- a.go --
//go:build linux
// +build linux

package p

func Foo() {}
-- b.go --
package p

func Bar() {}
-- unconstrained.go --
package p

func Baz() {}
-- constrained_sink.go --
//go:build linux
// +build linux

package p

func Qux() {}
-- linux.go --
//go:build linux
// +build linux

package p

func Foo() {}
-- linux_extra.go --
//go:build linux
// +build linux

package p

func Bar() {}
-- expected_linux_extra.go --
//go:build linux
// +build linux

package p

func Bar() {}

func Foo() {}
